costs_slippage.method: daily target-weight one-way turnover times 5 bps subtracted from close-to-close return

data_source: Alpaca real daily market data via qfa AlpacaGateway/qfa engine only; no CSV; no --data-csv
decision_reason: Watchlist: positive median random/stress-window Sharpe after costs and tolerable drawdown, but p25/orthogonality evidence is not strong enough for acceptance.

orthogonality.method: Pearson correlation of overlapping daily cost-adjusted equity returns from retained run JSON artifacts

sanitized_command_prose: Credentials were sourced from profile secret file if present with values redacted; ran qfa backtest for model.py with configured symbols/date window/timeframe and temporary SQLite DB, without --data-csv, daemon, or order commands.

divergent.mechanism: Use event timing/gap reversal, not drawdown-state ETF allocation.
divergent.title: Macro announcement intraday reversal using scheduled-event calendar proxies

suggested_children.refinement: Optional refinement: reduce redundancy with ETF stress/carry curves via explicit beta/correlation penalty.

warnings: qfa CLI has no native transaction-cost/slippage flag observed; 5 bps one-way costs applied externally.
Daily close-to-close bars omit intraday fill timing, bid/ask spread variation, and market impact.
Macro surprise variables are ETF OHLCV proxies, not true economic-release surprise data.
